rows.label: tlk70000018_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Ho there, fancy seeing you again!
Me? I'm just having a staring
contest with these here fish. Heh.

rows.label: tlk70000018_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Wh-what? You're saying I should
just go home already? W-well...

rows.label: tlk70000018_03_msg0003
rows.name:
To tell the truth, my wife was
vexed with me for leaving
without thanking you guys...

rows.label: tlk70000018_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I'm happy to be back in the city, I
really am... But I'd like to let
things cool off at home first. Heh.
